creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 238851
git diff for x11-themes/kde-icons-black-and-white

When I updated this port a couple weeks ago I tested
the WWW and it worked. Today, www.kde-look.org has
no IP. But kde-look.org *does*. However, kde-look.org
is a REDIR to store.kde.org.

The patch attached to this pr(1) acknowledges the above.

Thanks, Graham! :-)

--chris
